body:
## Pull request overview Optimizes the Module 8 dashboard “hot path” by consolidating dashboard reads into a single repository method, removing the write-on-read health score upsert, and adding a supporting meals index. **Changes:** - Refactored `get_dashboard` to use `MealRepository::getDashboardSummaryByDate()` for meal totals + water total + recent meals. - Removed the health score DB upsert side effect from `DashboardController::getDashboard()`. - Added a composite index on `(user_id, log_date, created_at DESC)` to support “recent meals” ordering and limit. ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 5 out of 5 changed files in this pull request and generated 2 comments.
Show a summary per file | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | modules/modul_8/Backend/Controllers/DashboardController.php | Uses consolidated summary method; removes health-score write-on-read. | | modules/modul_8/Backend/Repositories/MealRepository.php | Adds `getDashboardSummaryByDate()` to fetch aggregates + water + recent meals with ≤2 queries. | | modules/modul_8/schema.sql | Adds composite index to speed up recent-meals query pattern. | | modules/modul_8/Backend/index.php | Updates dashboard controller wiring to drop `WaterRepository` dependency. | | modules/modul_8/tests/Integration/DashboardControllerTest.php | Adds integration tests for dashboard + health score endpoints (but currently missing required harness). |
--- 💡 Add Copilot custom instructions for smarter, more guided reviews. Learn how to get started.
